summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with hands-on experience designing and deploying LLM-powered agents and workflows for real users in production. Built a multi-turn conversational AI interview platform using Anthropic Claude with dynamic context injection and automated candidate evaluation, and a production RAG developer assistant using LangChain and OpenAI with end-to-end API integrations. Experienced translating business requirements into working prototypes quickly, testing and iterating on AI systems, and communicating technical tradeoffs clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: LLM APIs, Agentic Workflows, Prompt Engineering, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, HuggingFace Transformers, LLM Evaluation, NLP, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, RESTful APIs, API Integration, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, AWS, GCP, Railway, Vercel, Git
